name: BWX Technologies, Inc.
business: BWX Technologies is a specialty manufacturer of nuclear components, a developer of nuclear technologies, and a service provider, focusing on precision naval nuclear components, nuclear reactors, and nuclear fuel for the U.S. Government. It also provides nuclear materials processing, environmental site restoration, products and services to the nuclear power industry, and critical medical radioisotopes and radiopharmaceuticals.
sellsTo: global naval and commercial shipping customers

exposures.sentence: Our core businesses focus on the design, engineering and manufacture of precision naval nuclear components, nuclear reactors and nuclear fuel for the U.S. Government.
Our core businesses focus on the design, engineering and manufacture of precision naval nuclear components, nuclear reactors and nuclear fuel for the U.S. Government.
This segment is also a leader in the development of advanced nuclear reactors for a variety of power and propulsion applications in the space and terrestrial domains.

This segment also manufactures and supplies products for diagnostic imaging and radiotherapeutic treatments and is a partner for contract development and manufacturing services for life science and pharmaceutical companies.
This segment also manufactures and supplies products for diagnostic imaging and radiotherapeutic treatments...

Through this segment, we design and manufacture commercial nuclear steam generators, heat exchangers, pressure vessels, reactor components and other auxiliary equipment... for the worldwide nuclear industry.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Aerojet Ordnance Tennessee completed
catalysts.sentence: On January 3, 2025, we completed the acquisition of Aerojet Ordnance Tennessee, Inc. ("A.O.T"), a subsidiary of L3Harris Technologies, Inc.
On May 20, 2025, we completed the acquisition Kinectrics Holdings, Inc., the parent company of Kinectrics, Inc. ("Kinectrics").

catalysts.event: Amendment of bilateral letter of credit facility to $75 million
catalysts.sentence: On May 14, 2025, we amended our bilateral letter of credit facility to increase the maximum aggregate amount to $75 million.
On November 10, 2025, we entered into a second Amended and Restated Credit Agreement (the "New Credit Facility")...

catalysts.event: Issuance of 0% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, the Company issued $1.25 billion aggregate principal amount of 0% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030 (the "2030 Notes"), including the exercise in full of the initial purchasers' option to purchase up to an additional $150.0 million principal amount of the 2030 Notes.
